one_time_description: Realized gain on disposal of trust fund investments
economic_notes: Consolidated entities include Crow Lake Gas & Convenience Ltd., Ojibways of Onigaming FN Economic Development Inc., and Ojibways of Onigaming FN Economic Development LP. Modified equity entities include Kakagi Lake Enterprises LP and 1833389 Ontario Inc.
notes: Audit is qualified due to missing budget comparison in statement of operations and statement of change in net financial assets. Accumulated surplus on balance sheet is $26,524,939 but statement of changes in accumulated surplus shows $26,733,115 — possible discrepancy between accumulated surplus and accumulated remeasurement gains components. Two entities (Kakagi Lake Enterprises LP and 1833389 Ontario Inc.) are accounted for by modified equity method and not fully consolidated. Realized gain on trust fund investments of $905,793 classified as one-time item. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + Health Canada + Province of Ontario + CMHC + Grand Council Treaty 3 + Weechi-it-te-win + Shooniyaa = 8,186,637 + 900,081 + 3,153,738 + 369,367 + 739,011 + 1,243,918 + 462,323 - note Grand Council Treaty 3, Weechi-it-te-win and Shooniyaa may be transfer agencies rather than direct government funding.
